title: Zombie Drops OP Loot
description: Turn zombies into an overpowered loot source for intense and rewarding survival gameplay.
body:
The Zombie is OP datapack upgrades zombies in Minecraft to become powerful and highly rewarding enemies. When defeated, zombies can drop overpowered items, enchanted gear, or rare resources, turning simple mob fights into valuable opportunities.

This datapack adds a fun risk-and-reward mechanic to survival mode while keeping vanilla gameplay mostly intact. It’s perfect for challenge worlds, multiplayer servers, and chaotic survival runs.

Features

Zombies drop OP items and rare loot

Enchanted tools, weapons, and armor included

Makes nighttime and cave exploration more exciting

Boosts survival progression speed

Compatible with vanilla mechanics

Works in singleplayer and multiplayer
